testcase.name: test_create_manual_subscription_with_term_months_6
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter150_new_features.py:346: in test_create_manual_subscription_with_term_months_6 assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"Expected 200/201, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 404: {"detail":"Customer not found"} E assert 404 in (200, 201) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_orders_blocked_when_limit_zero

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403 when max_orders_per_month=0, got 422. License enforcement for manual orders may not be fixed. assert 422 == 403 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

License enforcement for manual orders may not be fixed. E assert 422 == 403 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_subscriptions_blocked_when_limit_zero

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403 when max_subscriptions_per_month=0, got 404. License enforcement for manual subscriptions may not be fixed. assert 404 == 403 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Created product d64a8579-c30b-49d0-b8b5-f40ca8994b61 not found in list assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_cleanup_test_product
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter150_new_features.py:543: in test_cleanup_test_product assert r.status_code in (200, 204, 404), f"Unexpected response: {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Unexpected response: 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"is_active":false}}]} E assert 422 in (200, 204, 404) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
